name: Vite Dashboard + Auto-Discovery + AI Agent API
objective: Build auto-discovering presentation dashboard with AI agent API endpoints
exit_criteria: scripts/discover.ts scans html/ and generates public/api/manifest.json, public/llms.txt, public/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
Both HTML files have correct metadata format on line 2
index.html serves as dashboard entry with AI routing comments and meta tags
src/main.ts fetches manifest at runtime and renders presentation cards
src/style.css provides dark theme with card grid and CSS custom properties
.github/workflows/static.yml runs discover and build before deploy
